text:
### Data & Analytics Systems  
#### Data Warehouse (DW)  
**System ID:** DW-001
**Purpose:** Centralized analytics and business intelligence
**Technology:** AWS Redshift, Apache Spark
**Data Model:** Star schema (facts + dimensions)
**Update Frequency:** Real-time (for hot data), nightly batch (historical)  
**Key Data Marts:**
- **Customer Mart:** 500 customers × 50 attributes
- **Account Mart:** 800 accounts × attributes
- **Transaction Mart:** 2,000+ monthly transactions
- **Product Mart:** 5 products × performance metrics
- **Compliance Mart:** KYC, AML, complaints data  
**Dashboards & Reports:**
- Executive Dashboard (daily KPIs)
- Product Performance Dashboard
- Fraud Detection Dashboard
- Compliance & Risk Dashboard
- Customer Analytics Dashboard  
**Retention Policy:**
- Hot data (3 months): Real-time
- Warm data (1–3 years): Nightly batch
- Cold data (3+ years): Archive (S3)  
---
name: Chunk 9/39

raw_entities.name: Data Warehouse
raw_entities.description: Centralized analytics and business intelligence platform operating on AWS Redshift and Apache Spark. Utilizes a star schema data model with real-time updates for hot data and nightly batch processing for historical data. Serves as the foundational data layer for multiple specialized marts and executive dashboards.
context: Purpose: Centralized analytics and business intelligence

raw_entities.name: Customer Mart
raw_entities.description: Specialized data mart within the Data Warehouse focused on customer analytics. Stores structured customer data comprising 500 customers across 50 attributes to support analytical queries and reporting.

raw_entities.name: Account Mart
raw_entities.description: Dedicated data mart housing account-level information. Maintains records for 800 accounts with associated attributes to support analytical queries and reporting.

raw_entities.name: Transaction Mart
raw_entities.description: Data mart designed to store and process transactional data. Handles a volume of over 2,000 monthly transactions for analytical processing and reporting.

raw_entities.name: Product Mart
raw_entities.description: Analytics data mart focused on banking products. Stores performance metrics for 5 distinct products to enable product-level analysis and reporting.

raw_entities.name: Compliance Mart
raw_entities.description: Specialized data mart dedicated to regulatory and compliance data. Aggregates KYC, AML, and complaints data to support compliance reporting and risk monitoring.

raw_entities.name: Executive Dashboard
raw_entities.description: Reporting interface providing daily key performance indicators for executive oversight and strategic decision-making.

raw_entities.name: Product Performance Dashboard
raw_entities.description: Analytical reporting tool focused on tracking and visualizing the performance metrics of banking products.

raw_entities.name: Fraud Detection Dashboard
raw_entities.description: Analytics dashboard designed to monitor, analyze, and report on fraud-related activities and alerts within the bank's systems.

raw_entities.name: Compliance & Risk Dashboard
raw_entities.description: Reporting interface focused on monitoring regulatory compliance status and organizational risk exposure through aggregated data visualizations.

raw_entities.name: Customer Analytics Dashboard
raw_entities.description: Analytical reporting tool dedicated to tracking customer behavior, trends, and metrics for business intelligence purposes.

raw_entities.name: Data Retention Policy
raw_entities.description: Governs the storage lifecycle and processing frequency of data based on its age. Mandates real-time updates for hot data (3 months), nightly batch processing for warm data (1–3 years), and S3 archiving for cold data (3+ years).

raw_entities.name: Daily Executive KPI Reporting Frequency
raw_entities.description: Operational target requiring the delivery of key performance indicators on a daily basis through the Executive Dashboard.

raw_entities.name: Monthly Transaction Processing Capacity
raw_entities.description: Quantitative target defining the data warehouse's transaction mart capacity to handle over 2,000 transactions per month.

raw_entities.name: Customer Data Profile Size
raw_entities.description: Target defining the data mart's storage scope for customer profiles, specifying 500 customers with 50 attributes each.

raw_entities.name: Account Data Profile Size
raw_entities.description: Target defining the data mart's storage scope for account records, specifying 800 accounts with associated attributes.

raw_entities.name: Product Performance Data Scope
raw_entities.description: Target defining the product mart's analytical scope, covering performance metrics for 5 distinct banking products.

properties.rule_statement: Hot data retained for 3 months with real-time updates; warm data for 1-3 years with nightly batch; cold data archived to S3 after 3+ years

properties.what_it_measures: Number of products tracked for performance metrics

relationships.description: The Data Warehouse provides customer attribute data to the Customer Mart for downstream analytics and reporting.
relationships.context: Key Data Marts: Customer Mart: 500 customers × 50 attributes

relationships.description: The Data Warehouse provides account-level data to the Account Mart for performance tracking.
The Data Warehouse provides transactional data to the Transaction Mart for processing capacity monitoring.
The Data Warehouse provides product performance metrics to the Product Mart for scope tracking.
The Data Warehouse provides KYC, AML, and complaints data to the Compliance Mart for regulatory tracking.
relationships.context: Compliance Mart: KYC, AML, complaints data

relationships.description: The Data Warehouse feeds daily KPI data to the Executive Dashboard for executive reporting.
The Data Warehouse feeds product performance data to the Product Performance Dashboard.
The Data Warehouse feeds transactional and customer data to the Fraud Detection Dashboard.
The Data Warehouse feeds compliance and risk data to the Compliance & Risk Dashboard.
The Data Warehouse feeds customer analytics data to the Customer Analytics Dashboard.
The Customer Mart tracks and measures the size of customer data profiles based on attribute counts.
The Account Mart tracks and measures the size of account data profiles based on attribute counts.
The Transaction Mart measures monthly transaction processing capacity against volume thresholds.
The Product Mart measures the scope of product performance data across tracked products.
The Executive Dashboard tracks and reports daily executive KPIs according to the specified frequency.
The Data Warehouse's data lifecycle and storage operations are governed by the Data Retention Policy across hot, warm, and cold tiers.
relationships.context: Retention Policy: Hot data (3 months): Real-time - Warm data (1–3 years): Nightly batch - Cold data (3+ years): Archive (S3)
